problem: Healthcare organizations face challenges in securely exchanging patient data across networks, complying with TEFCA and state-level health information exchange requirements, and accessing complete patient records.
solution: Health Gorilla operates as a dual-designated QHIN (Qualified Health Information Network) and QHIO, providing national network infrastructure and APIs for secure patient data exchange, enabling compliance with CalHHS DxF and TEFCA while offering value-add data solutions to capture the complete patient journey.
